title: Catcow exposes its field stat-switch rule

card.rawText: For 2 turn cycles, all creatures switch their own base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier.

effect.value: For 2 turn cycles, all creatures switch their own base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier.

plan.title: Catcow exposes its field stat-switch rule
plan.summary: Place Catcow as field magic and verify the headless runtime recognizes the static stat modifier route for switching attack dice and modifier.

notes: Read text first: For 2 turn cycles, all creatures switch their own base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier.

steps: Place Catcow in the field magic slot.
Verify its static field stat-rule route is represented.

expectedAssertions.label: Catcow remains active as field magic

manualVerification: A future deeper fixture should verify each creature swaps its own base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier values for exactly 2 turn cycles.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Place Catcow as field magic and verify the headless runtime recognizes the static stat modifier route for switching attack dice and modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
